eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Canyon; Ada; Payette; Gem; Owyhee, ID; at 02:15 AM ON APR 25, 2026 Effective until 04:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Idaho State Police is looking for a missing person who was last seen at in the area of Track Road Caldwell and is believed to be in danger. He is a 69 year old male with grey hair brown eyes 6 foot 1 inch tall 275 pounds and was last seen wearing a leather jacket and sweatpants carrying a leather satchel. Authorities say that the missing person may be traveling on a white concord E Bike. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact 9  1  1 immediately.
